zh.lifeSummary: 當William Mordaunt於大約1200年出生在英國英格蘭貝德福爾時，他的父親Eustace le Mordaunt , of Radwell44歲，母親Alice Alento , heiress of Turvey65歲。他於大約1235年與Amicia De Olney在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1279年之前在英國貝德福爾圖維。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Mordaunt于大约1200年出生在英国英格兰貝德福爾时，他的父亲Eustace le Mordaunt , of Radwell44岁，母亲Alice Alento , heiress of Turvey65岁。他于大约1235年与Amicia De Olney在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1279年之前在英国貝德福爾圖維。

nameMeanings.name: Mordaunt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French mordant ‘biting, sarcastic’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When William Mordaunt was born about 1200, in Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Eustace le Mordaunt , of Radwell, was 44 and his mother, Alice Alento , heiress of Turvey, was 65. He married Amicia De Olney about 1235, in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died before 1279, in Turvey, Bedfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Mordaunt est né environ 1200, à Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Eustace le Mordaunt , of Radwell, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Alice Alento , heiress of Turvey, avait 65 ans. Il a épousé Amicia De Olney environ 1235, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé avant 1279, à Turvey, Bedfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Mordaunt um 1200 in Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Eustace le Mordaunt , of Radwell 44 und seine Mutter Alice Alento , heiress of Turvey 65. Er hat um 1235 in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom Amicia De Olney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb vor 1279 in Turvey, Bedfordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Mordaunt è nato il circa 1200 nel Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Eustace le Mordaunt , of Radwell, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Alice Alento , heiress of Turvey, aveva 65 anni. Lui sposato Amicia De Olney circa 1235, nel Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì prima del 1279, nel Turvey, Bedfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Mordauntが約1200年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Eustace le Mordaunt , of Radwellは44歳，母Alice Alento , heiress of Turveyは65歳であった。約1235年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアでAmicia De Olneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1279年以前にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアトゥルビーで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Mordaunt(이)가 대략 1200년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Eustace le Mordaunt , of Radwell(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Alento , heiress of Turvey(은)는 65세였다. 그는 대략 1235년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르에서 Amicia De Olney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1279년 이전 영국 베드퍼드실르 터르비에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Mordaunt nasceu aproximadamente 1200, em Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Eustace le Mordaunt , of Radwell, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Alice Alento , heiress of Turvey, tinha 65 anos. Ele casou-se com Amicia De Olney aproximadamente 1235, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu antes 1279, em Turvey, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Mordaunt родился около 1200 г. в местности бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Eustace le Mordaunt , of Radwell было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Alento , heiress of Turvey, 65. Он женился на женщине по имени Amicia De Olney около 1235 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер перед 1279 г. в местности турви, бедфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Mordaunt nació aproximadamente 1200, en Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Eustace le Mordaunt , of Radwell, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Alice Alento , heiress of Turvey, tenía 65 años. Se casó con Amicia De Olney aproximadamente 1235, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió antes de 1279, en Turvey, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.
